benefits.description: Notices a huge difference in mood with creatine
Notices improved mental clarity with creatine after reaching saturation point

protocol_notes: States body needs to reach a saturation point before noticing effects, which can take up to a month depending on dose. Uses 5g/day for maintenance. Cycles off all supplements periodically for a fresh start. Note: dose unit likely 'g' not 'mg' but stored as stated in text context.
